description: Plant pots/seed pots/cultivation pots. Material: paper, pulp. Size (L x W x H): 6 x 6 x 5.6 cm. Package contents: 14 pieces. Colour: natural. Square sowing pots for cultivation. Biodegradable. For sowing plants, flowers and vegetables. These square seed pots are suitable for your plant cultivation. The growing pots provide an ideal environment for germination and growth of your favourite flowers, vegetables and herbs. Made from biodegradable material, our pots are not only environmentally friendly, but also provide optimal ventilation and moisture control for your plants. The square shape allows for efficient use of space and makes repotting easier. For hobby gardeners and plant lovers, the plant pots are a suitable gift idea that brings a lot of joy.
